name: Staff Pick Banner
description: A visually striking banner for 'Staff Pick' trips. Uses a vibrant red-to-yellow gradient background to make a specific trip stand out on listing pages.

field_schema.label: Featured Trip
field_schema.help: Pick the trip to feature. Leave empty to auto-pick the oldest trip.

field_schema.label: Badge Text
field_schema.help: Small pill above the heading (e.g. "#1 Staff Pick").
